name: PVW Resources Limited
description: PVW Resources Limited is an Australia-based diversified resource company focused on the exploration and exploitation of mineral properties. The company maintains a robust project portfolio spanning tier-one mining jurisdictions, including the Tanami region, the Gascoyne region, Kalgoorlie, and Leonora in Western Australia. Established in 2018 and headquartered in Perth, PVW Resources primarily engages in gold exploration, leveraging its strategic assets to identify and develop high-potential mineral deposits within these prolific geological regions. The company is publicly listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the ticker symbol PVW.
